nonBlockingIssues.description: fixVerticalAlignProperties() and createSpanSubcontainer() in container.go:51-74 remain dead code with zero callers. The conflict case (both -kfx-baseline-shift and -kfx-baseline-style with different values requiring a subcontainer span) was never observed in test books, so the simpler overwrite approach was used instead.

When both -kfx-baseline-shift and -kfx-baseline-style produce different vertical-align values, Go overwrites one with the other instead of creating a subcontainer span like Python does. This is a deliberate trade-off documented in the code.
Missing warning log for unmapped layout hint symbols. Python logs 'Unexpected layout_hint %s' but Go silently drops unmapped symbols. Should add log.Warnf per AGENTS.md guidance.
.webp maps to 'image' resource type prefix in Go vs 'video' in Python's RESOURCE_TYPE_OF_EXT. WebP is extremely rare in KFX so unlikely to matter in practice.

Python's get_external_resource modifies location_fn from yj.conversion.source_resource_filename and yj.authoring.source_file_name properties before the location extension fallback. Go doesn't parse these properties. Pre-existing gap not introduced by this change.
Feature description was slightly misleading about offset-0 anchor placement, but the actual implementation correctly matches Python's behavior (id goes on content_elem directly). No fix needed.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a note about Go's CSS class-based architecture allowing property-level fixes where Python needs render-level fixes. This pattern has recurred across multiple features and should guide future workers' approach to fixing CSS-related issues.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-vertical-align-baseline-shift worker identified that the feature description said to wire fixVerticalAlignProperties into 6 storyline.go call sites, but the fix was better done at convertYJProperties level since Go uses CSS classes rather than inline styles. This same architectural insight applies broadly.

rejectedObservations.observation: Dead code in container.go (fixVerticalAlignProperties, createSpanSubcontainer) should be removed or annotated
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous — the code exists for a rare conflict case that could theoretically occur in future books. Keeping it is intentional, and removing it would be a design decision for the orchestrator.
